General.Name: Oriental University City Holdings HK Ltd
General.Description: Oriental University City Holdings (H.K.) Limited, an investment holding company, leases education facilities in the People's Republic of China, Malaysia, Indonesia, and Switzerland. It operates in two segments, Education Facilities Leasing Services, and Leasing and Managing of Hotel Properties. The company owns and leases teaching buildings and dormitories to education institutions; and commercial properties to commercial tenants operating various supporting facilities, including shopping centers, supermarkets, cafes and cafeterias, banks, telecommunication companies, dental and polyclinics, and others. It is also involved in the renting, leasing, and managing of hotel properties. In addition, the company lease buildings and premises to tenants operating in various supporting facilities, including hospital, grocery stores, laundry shops, internet cafes, and canteen. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Hebei, the People's Republic of China. Oriental University City Holdings (H.K.) Limited is a subsidiary of Raffles Education Limited.
